title: psychotria lycioides
intro: Psychotria lycioides, also known as Wild Coffee or Red Bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Psychotria lycioides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
